visa_types.name: Business
visa_types.documents_required:
Please click here  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6hHBEBI4f18rs84Cs64yPf/9beb30873d4ca76e96a6ee5d233a9704/business_invitation_letter.pdf)to see the form of invitation letter.
Please click here the list of required documents.
- Applicants are required to provide proof of their own financial resources, regardless of whether the host company covers the applicant's accommodation or other expenses.
- Applicants must apply for the visa in the Country of habitual residence. Third country nationals (non-Kazakh citizens) must provide a Residence permit issued by Kazakhstan, valid for at least six months before the scheduled departure and valid for at least three months after the end of the intended trip.
- Applicants shall submit a bank statement showing proof of sufficient means of subsistence (salary or other sources of income). Bank statements shall be provided in original issued by the bank for the last three months with verification QR codes. Bank statements relating to other cards (e.g. Kaspi account, other prepaid cards etc.) are optional and not sufficient to demonstrate the availability of reliable financial guarantees.
- Please note that the Embassy Visa Office may proceed with an interview with the applicant and, when circumstances require it, request additional/supplementary documents.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[ita > kaz > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
There is a service charge of 17 340 KZT (Inclusive of 16% VAT) levied per application above the visa fees
The visa application center offers optional additional services:

[ita > kaz > en > Visa Fees 2]
All fees are paid by card or in cash only in local currency – KZT (tenge).
All VFS service charges are paid by card or in cash only in KZT.
All optional services are paid by card or in cash only in KZT.
visa_types.processing_time:
Due to the duration of document processing, it is advisable to submit applications well in advance, at least 15 calendar days prior and no earlier that 6 month before the date of departure. In some cases, processing time may be extended to 45 days. In case of late submission, the Embassy may refuse acceptance of your documents. The application processing time for relatives of the EU citizens is as short as possible.
Please note that application processing time and decisions on visa are the sole responsibility of the Embassy or Consulate.
Important Notice for Visa Applicants
As per the requirements of the Mission, there are instances where applicants may be requested to visit our Visa Application Center (VAC) in person. This request applies even if the application was submitted by a third party or if courier service was ordered for document delivery.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A business visa is granted for those who are visiting Italy for business meetings.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A business visa is granted for those who are visiting Italy for business meetings.

## Visa Fees

[ita > kaz > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
There is a service charge of 17 340 KZT (Inclusive of 16% VAT) levied per application above the visa fees
The visa application center offers optional additional services:

[ita > kaz > en > Visa Fees 2]
All fees are paid by card or in cash only in local currency – KZT (tenge).
All VFS service charges are paid by card or in cash only in KZT.
All optional services are paid by card or in cash only in KZT.

## Documents Required
Please click here  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6hHBEBI4f18rs84Cs64yPf/9beb30873d4ca76e96a6ee5d233a9704/business_invitation_letter.pdf)to see the form of invitation letter.
Please click here the list of required documents.
- Applicants are required to provide proof of their own financial resources, regardless of whether the host company covers the applicant's accommodation or other expenses.
- Applicants must apply for the visa in the Country of habitual residence. Third country nationals (non-Kazakh citizens) must provide a Residence permit issued by Kazakhstan, valid for at least six months before the scheduled departure and valid for at least three months after the end of the intended trip.
- Applicants shall submit a bank statement showing proof of sufficient means of subsistence (salary or other sources of income). Bank statements shall be provided in original issued by the bank for the last three months with verification QR codes. Bank statements relating to other cards (e.g. Kaspi account, other prepaid cards etc.) are optional and not sufficient to demonstrate the availability of reliable financial guarantees.
- Please note that the Embassy Visa Office may proceed with an interview with the applicant and, when circumstances require it, request additional/supplementary documents.

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 3.5*4.0cm in width
- The background of the photo should be bright, plain and even
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- If a person has to cover his head due to religious reasons, the head cover may not cover the face of the person.
- No glasses, if they impede eye visibility.

## Processing Time
Due to the duration of document processing, it is advisable to submit applications well in advance, at least 15 calendar days prior and no earlier that 6 month before the date of departure. In some cases, processing time may be extended to 45 days. In case of late submission, the Embassy may refuse acceptance of your documents. The application processing time for relatives of the EU citizens is as short as possible.
Please note that application processing time and decisions on visa are the sole responsibility of the Embassy or Consulate.
Important Notice for Visa Applicants
As per the requirements of the Mission, there are instances where applicants may be requested to visit our Visa Application Center (VAC) in person. This request applies even if the application was submitted by a third party or if courier service was ordered for document delivery.

## Download Forms
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3LxGiGwIkD0LdSmLgshGld/7b3fa379410e68aa0319cffd6dcf6464/Harmonised__application__form_Schengen_Visa.pdf) to see the visa application form.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters for people wishing to stay in Italy for a period maximum 3 months per half a year for the purpose of study: postgraduate education, short-term courses, language courses, exchange or other programs.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters for people wishing to stay in Italy for a period maximum 3 months per half a year for the purpose of study: postgraduate education, short-term courses, language courses, exchange or other programs.

## Visa Fees

[ita > kaz > en > Table:Visit family/friends > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
There is a service charge of 17 340 KZT (Inclusive of 16% VAT) levied per application above the visa fees
The visa application center offers optional additional services:

[ita > kaz > en > Visa Fees 2]
All fees are paid by card or in cash only in local currency – KZT (tenge).
All VFS service charges are paid by card or in cash only in KZT.
All optional services are paid by card or in cash only in KZT.

## Documents Required
Please click here to see the list of required documents
- Applicants must apply for the visa in the Country of habitual residence. Third country nationals (non-Kazakh citizens) must provide a Residence permit issued by Kazakhstan, valid for at least six months before the scheduled departure and valid for at least three months after the end of the intended trip.
- Applicants shall submit a bank statement showing proof of sufficient means of subsistence (salary or other sources of income). Bank statements shall be provided in original issued by the bank for the last three months with verification QR codes. Bank statements relating to other cards (e.g. Kaspi account, other prepaid cards etc.) are optional and not sufficient to demonstrate the availability of reliable financial guarantees.
- Please note that the Embassy Visa Office may proceed with an interview with the applicant and, when circumstances require it, request additional/supplementary documents.

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 3.5*4.0cm in width
- The background of the photo should be bright, plain and even
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- If a person has to cover his head due to religious reasons, the head cover may not cover the face of the person.
- No glasses, if they impede eye visibility.

## Processing Time
Due to the duration of document processing, it is advisable to submit applications well in advance, at least 15 calendar days prior and no earlier that 6 month before the date of departure. In some cases, processing time may be extended to 45 days. In case of late submission, the Embassy may refuse acceptance of your documents. The application processing time for relatives of the EU citizens is as short as possible.
Please note that application processing time and decisions on visa are the sole responsibility of the Embassy or Consulate.
Important Notice for Visa Applicants
As per the requirements of the Mission, there are instances where applicants may be requested to visit our Visa Application Center (VAC) in person. This request applies even if the application was submitted by a third party or if courier service was ordered for document delivery.

## Download Forms
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3LxGiGwIkD0LdSmLgshGld/7b3fa379410e68aa0319cffd6dcf6464/Harmonised__application__form_Schengen_Visa.pdf) to see the visa application form.

visa_types.name: Family Reasons Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Please click here to see the list of required documents for family members of non European Union citizenship.
Please click here to see the list of required documents for family members of citizens of the European Union. Please note that holders of Family reasons National visa must submit an application for a residence permit in a competent police department within 8 working days of entering Italy.
Family members of citizens of the European Union may apply for visa in Visa Application Center without appointment. To confirm you family relationship it is required to provide identity document (marriage, paternity or birth certificate).
Please, complete the online form by following link  (https://e-applicationvisa.esteri.it/?L=it-IT), print and fill with the appropriate "2D barcode.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This type of visa is issued for family reunification with EU and non-EU residents who are staying in Italy
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This type of visa is issued for family reunification with EU and non-EU residents who are staying in Italy

## Visa Fees

[ita > kaz > en > Table:Re-entry Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
There is a service charge of 17 340 KZT (Inclusive of 16% VAT) levied per application above the visa fees 
The visa application center offers optional additional services:

[ita > kaz > en > Visa Fees 2]
All fees are paid by card or in cash only in local currency – KZT (tenge).
All VFS service charges are paid by card or in cash only in KZT.
All optional services are paid by card or in cash only in KZT.

## Documents Required
Please click here to see the list of required documents for family members of non European Union citizenship.
Please click here to see the list of required documents for family members of citizens of the European Union. Please note that holders of Family reasons National visa must submit an application for a residence permit in a competent police department within 8 working days of entering Italy.
Family members of citizens of the European Union may apply for visa in Visa Application Center without appointment. To confirm you family relationship it is required to provide identity document (marriage, paternity or birth certificate).
Please, complete the online form by following link  (https://e-applicationvisa.esteri.it/?L=it-IT), print and fill with the appropriate "2D barcode.

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 3.5*4.0cm in width
- The background of the photo should be bright, plain and even
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- If a person has to cover his head due to religious reasons, the head cover may not cover the face of the person.
- No glasses, if they impede eye visibility.

## Processing Time
Due to the duration of document processing, it is advisable to submit applications well in advance, at least 15 calendar days prior and no earlier that 6 month before the date of departure. In some cases, processing time may be extended to 45 days. In case of late submission, the Embassy may refuse acceptance of your documents. The application processing time for relatives of the EU citizens is as short as possible.
Please note that application processing time and decisions on visa are the sole responsibility of the Embassy or Consulate.
As per the requirements of the Mission, there are instances where applicants may be requested to visit our Visa Application Center (VAC) in person. This request applies even if the application was submitted by a third party or if courier service was ordered for document delivery.

## Download Forms
Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/italy/kazakhstan/russian/pdf/Formulario-Visto-Nazionale.pdf) to see the visa application form

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This is the visa for cases in which the ''Residence Permit'' has expired no more than 60 days ago, extendable to 180 only in the case of documented serious personal health reasons and has not been renewed before leaving Italy
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This is the visa for cases in which the ''Residence Permit'' has expired no more than 60 days ago, extendable to 180 only in the case of documented serious personal health reasons and has not been renewed before leaving Italy

## Visa Fees

[ita > kaz > en > Table:Re-entry Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
There is a service charge of 17 340 KZT (Inclusive of 16% VAT) levied per application above the visa fees 
The visa application center offers optional additional services:

[ita > kaz > en > Visa Fees 2]
All fees are paid by card or in cash only in local currency – KZT (tenge).
All VFS service charges are paid by card or in cash only in KZT.
All optional services are paid by card or in cash only in KZT.

## Documents Required
Please click here to see the list of required documents

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 3.5*4.0cm in width
- The background of the photo should be bright, plain and even
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- If a person has to cover his head due to religious reasons, the head cover may not cover the face of the person.
- No glasses, if they impede eye visibility.

## Processing Time
Due to the duration of document processing, it is advisable to submit applications well in advance, at least 15 calendar days prior and no earlier that 6 month before the date of departure. In some cases, processing time may be extended to 45 days. In case of late submission, the Embassy may refuse acceptance of your documents. The application processing time for relatives of the EU citizens is as short as possible.
Please note that application processing time and decisions on visa are the sole responsibility of the Embassy or Consulate.
As per the requirements of the Mission, there are instances where applicants may be requested to visit our Visa Application Center (VAC) in person. This request applies even if the application was submitted by a third party or if courier service was ordered for document delivery.

## Download Forms
Please click here  (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/italy/kazakhstan/russian/pdf/Formulario-Visto-Nazionale.pdf)to see the visa application form

Overview
Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Italy for tourism.

All optional services are paid by card or in cash only in KZT.

## Documents Required
Please click here to see the list of required documents.
Please click here (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/italy/kazakhstan/english/pdf/invitation%20letter.pdf) to see the form of invitation letter
Family members of citizens of the European Union may apply for visa in Visa Application Center without appointment. To confirm you family relationship it is required to provide identity document (marriage, paternity or birth certificate).
Please, complete the online form by following link  (https://e-applicationvisa.esteri.it/?L=it-IT)print and fill with the appropriate "2D barcode.
Please click here (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/italy/kazakhstan/english/pdf/Checklist-for-Tourism-Relatives-of-an-EU-citizen-Italiano_RU_REV.pdf) to see the list of required documents
- Applicants must apply for the visa in the Country of habitual residence. Third country nationals (non-Kazakh citizens) must provide a Residence permit issued by Kazakhstan, valid for at least six months before the scheduled departure and valid for at least three months after the end of the intended trip.
- Applicants shall submit a bank statement showing proof of sufficient means of subsistence (salary or other sources of income). Bank statements shall be provided in original issued by the bank for the last three months with verification QR codes. Bank statements relating to other cards (e.g. Kaspi account, other prepaid cards etc.) are optional and not sufficient to demonstrate the availability of reliable financial guarantees.
- Please note that the Embassy Visa Office may proceed with an interview with the applicant and, when circumstances require it, request additional/supplementary documents.

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 3.5*4.0cm in width
- The background of the photo should be bright, plain and even
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- If a person has to cover his head due to religious reasons, the head cover may not cover the face of the person.
- No glasses, if they impede eye visibility.

## Processing Time
Due to the duration of document processing, it is advisable to submit applications well in advance, at least 15 calendar days prior and no earlier that 6 month before the date of departure. In some cases, processing time may be extended to 45 days. In case of late submission, the Embassy may refuse acceptance of your documents. The application processing time for relatives of the EU citizens is as short as possible.
Please note that application processing time and decisions on visa are the sole responsibility of the Embassy or Consulate.
Important Notice for Visa Applicants
As per the requirements of the Mission, there are instances where applicants may be requested to visit our Visa Application Center (VAC) in person. This request applies even if the application was submitted by a third party or if courier service was ordered for document delivery.

## Download Forms
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3LxGiGwIkD0LdSmLgshGld/7b3fa379410e68aa0319cffd6dcf6464/Harmonised__application__form_Schengen_Visa.pdf) to see the visa application form.

For Schengen Visas (type “C”), all decisions must be given within 15 calendar days, extendable to 45 days (see art. 23 of the Schengen Visa Code), while for National Visas (type “D”) the processing time - generally 90 days – are reduced to 30 days for visas for family reunion and salaried work, and extended to 120 days for self-employment work visas.
Important Notice for Visa Applicants

visa_types.overview:
Overview
In the case of activities requiring a stay in Italy for more than 90 days within six months, it is necessary to obtain a national visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
In the case of activities requiring a stay in Italy for more than 90 days within six months, it is necessary to obtain a national visa.

## Visa Fees

[ita > kaz > en > Table:Study (enrollment at universities) > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
There is a service charge of 17 340 KZT (Inclusive of 16% VAT) levied per application above the visa fees
The visa application center offers optional additional services:

[ita > kaz > en > Visa Fees 2]
All fees are paid by card or in cash only in local currency – KZT (tenge).
All VFS service charges are paid by card or in cash only in KZT.
All optional services are paid by card or in cash only in KZT.

## Documents Required
Please click here to see the list of required documents

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 3.5*4.0cm in width
- The background of the photo should be bright, plain and even
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- If a person has to cover his head due to religious reasons, the head cover may not cover the face of the person.
- No glasses, if they impede eye visibility.

## Processing Time
For Schengen Visas (type “C”), all decisions must be given within 15 calendar days, extendable to 45 days (see art. 23 of the Schengen Visa Code), while for National Visas (type “D”) the processing time - generally 90 days – are reduced to 30 days for visas for family reunion and salaried work, and extended to 120 days for self-employment work visas.
Important Notice for Visa Applicants
As per the requirements of the Mission, there are instances where applicants may be requested to visit our Visa Application Center (VAC) in person. This request applies even if the application was submitted by a third party or if courier service was ordered for document delivery.
